response.justification: Candidate is a strong generalist software engineer with deep expertise in TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang, but the role specifically requires a senior C++ developer with industrial automation and cybersecurity background. C++ experience is limited to a brief stint at National Instruments (Dec 2014 – Jun 2015), over a decade ago, and there is no evidence of STL mastery, multi-threaded C++ systems, IEC 62443 / SDL practice, MQTT, or industrial protocols (Modbus, OPC UA, etc.). The recent stack and domain focus (web platforms, GIS, direct mail, AI tooling) diverge sharply from the on-prem industrial automation requirements.
strengths: Senior-level tenure (~13+ years) with architecture and mentoring experience
Strong software craftsmanship: TDD, CI/CD, testing tooling, agile practices
Distributed/event-driven systems experience (high-throughput micro-services at Sociomantic)
concerns: Only ~6 months of professional C++ exposure, dated to 2014–2015
No demonstrated IEC 62443 / SDL / industrial cybersecurity background
No MQTT, Modbus, OPC UA, or industrial automation domain experience

key_factors.factor: Senior engineering breadth and architecture experience
